generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor networks collecting real-time measurements from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor measurements from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD representation of physical structures"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, ControlEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations describing dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, ControlEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine processing geometric and analytical models with sensor data to predict system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and operational optimality through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithms for performance enhancement through optimization processes"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers for automated adjustments based on system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for identifying anomalies in system behavior using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for determining current system states using sensor inputs and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations to forecast physical twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and operational optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatusInsight, OptimalityStatusInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection to identify anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation to determine current system states based on sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies anomalies in system behavior for fault detection"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Determines current system states based on sensor inputs"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides recommendations for performance enhancement through optimization"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasts future system behavior based on current conditions"
]

instance SafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluates system safety status based on monitoring"
]

instance OptimalityStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluates operational optimality based on monitoring"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to physical twin based on control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system orchestrates calibration algorithms to update physical and cyber models with parameter estimates from sensor data, which inform monitoring systems that assess safety and optimality; detected violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to adjust the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that adjust parameters using sensor data to ensure accurate representation of the Physical Twin's current state. Validation is performed via continuous monitoring systems that detect safety and performance violations, triggering corrective actions by humans or automated algorithms to maintain system integrity."
]
